title: Senior Software Engineer - Samsung R&D India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Samsung R&D India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Samsung R&D India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Samsung R&D India:
Samsung R&D India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India!
